hero.title: Building a new generation of African entrepreneurs — from Germany.
hero.subtitle: Diambilay Business Center Germany unites incubation, capital, mentorship and world-class events so founders with African roots can scale globally.

services.title: The full stack of African entrepreneurship, in Germany.
services.subtitle: Six interconnected pillars designed to move founders from idea to investable business to global brand.

incubation.title: Incubation
incubation.short: 90-day programs that turn early-stage ideas into venture-ready businesses.
incubation.long: Intensive sprints, structured curriculum, dedicated mentors, Berlin studio space and a clear graduation ladder into our investment pipeline.

courses.title: Courses
courses.short: On-demand and cohort-based courses led by the continent's sharpest operators.
courses.long: From first business plan to CFO-grade finance, our catalog is built with practitioners who've done the work. Available in EN, DE and FR.

investments.title: Investments
investments.short: Pre-seed to Series A capital for African-founded businesses bridging EU ↔ Africa.
investments.long: We back operators we know, with capital, networks and exit optionality. Thesis-led, people-first.
bullets: Co-invest with top European and African funds

mentorship.title: Mentorship
mentorship.short: 1-on-1 sessions with senior leaders who built what you're building.
mentorship.long: Our mentor network spans former Fortune 500 execs, African unicorn founders and European venture partners. Booked monthly, reviewed quarterly.

events.title: Richesses d'Afrique
events.short: Flagship conferences and masterclasses that bring the ecosystem to one room.
events.long: Our annual Richesses d'Afrique conference gathers 950+ founders, investors and executives. In 2026 we land at Congress Center West, Messe Essen on June 13.
bullets: Quarterly masterclasses in Berlin, Frankfurt, Paris

elearning.title: E-Learning
elearning.short: Richesses d'Afrique by DBC — the online academy for African entrepreneurship.
elearning.long: Podia-hosted platform with masterclasses from the DBC faculty. Same quality as in-person, on your schedule.

events.title: Events that change careers.
events.subtitle: Live moments built for founders, investors and the diaspora shaping Africa's economy.
events.noUpcoming: Our next public event is being announced soon. Join the list below.

about.title: From Lubumbashi to Berlin — one mission.
about.body: Founded in Lubumbashi by Dr. Jean-Clément Diambilay, Diambilay Business Center is Africa's most active cross-border incubator. DBC Germany brings every program, every investment thesis and every course to the African diaspora in Europe, without compromise.

contact.title: Let's build together.
contact.subtitle: Tell us who you are. We reply personally within two business days.
contact.success: Thanks — your message is in. We'll be in touch.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email hello@dbc-germany.com.

footer.parentOrg: A subsidiary of Diambilay Business Center, Lubumbashi.

cta.readySub: Whether you're founding, funding or mentoring — there's a pillar for you.
